# Step 8 — Article Import Wiring

> **Epic**: E1.3.5 | **Task**: T1.3.5.3.1.2
> **Depends on**: Step 5 (bookmarks provider) + Step 7 (get_text endpoint)
> **Skills to load**: `riverpod-providers`, `flutter-implementing-navigation-and-routing`

Shared context: [E1.3.5 Instapaper Context](../instructions/e1.3.5-instapaper-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Wire the article import flow: tapping a bookmark fetches HTML → normalises via `ContentNormaliser` → navigates to reading screen. This completes the end-to-end Instapaper reading flow.

**Read first**: `lib/navigation/app_router.dart` and `lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart` to understand existing patterns.

---

## Files to Modify

### 1. `lib/features/content/providers/instapaper_bookmarks_provider.dart`

Add an `importArticle` method to the bookmarks provider:

```dart
/// Import state for tracking article fetch progress.
///
/// Stored separately from the bookmark list to avoid blocking list display.
sealed class ArticleImportState {
  const ArticleImportState();
}

/// No import in progress.
class ArticleImportIdle extends ArticleImportState {
  const ArticleImportIdle();
}

/// Fetching and normalising article content.
class ArticleImportLoading extends ArticleImportState {
  const ArticleImportLoading({required this.bookmarkId, required this.title});
  /// The bookmark being imported.
  final int bookmarkId;
  /// Article title for display.
  final String title;
}

/// Article ready for reading.
class ArticleImportDone extends ArticleImportState {
  const ArticleImportDone({
    required this.bookmarkId,
    required this.title,
    required this.document,
  });
  /// The bookmark that was imported.
  final int bookmarkId;
  /// Article title.
  final String title;
  /// Normalised document ready for paced reading.
  final ExtractedDocument document;
}

/// Article import failed.
class ArticleImportError extends ArticleImportState {
  const ArticleImportError({required this.message});
  /// Human-readable error message.
  final String message;
}
```

Create a separate provider for import state:

```dart
/// Manages article import lifecycle — fetch HTML, normalise, signal ready.
@riverpod
class InstapaperArticleImport extends _$InstapaperArticleImport {
  @override
  ArticleImportState build() => const ArticleImportIdle();

  /// Fetch article HTML and normalise for paced reading.
  ///
  /// On success, transitions to [ArticleImportDone] with the
  /// [ExtractedDocument]. The caller should listen for this state
  /// and navigate to the reading screen.
  Future<void> importArticle(InstapaperBookmark bookmark) async {
    final authNotifier = ref.read(instapaperAuthProvider.notifier);
    final client = authNotifier.client;
    if (client == null) {
      state = const ArticleImportError(message: 'Not signed in to Instapaper');
      return;
    }

    state = ArticleImportLoading(
      bookmarkId: bookmark.bookmarkId,
      title: bookmark.title,
    );

    try {
      final html = await client.getBookmarkText(bookmarkId: bookmark.bookmarkId);
      final document = await ContentNormaliser.normalise(html, ContentType.html);
      state = ArticleImportDone(
        bookmarkId: bookmark.bookmarkId,
        title: bookmark.title,
        document: document,
      );
    } on InstapaperApiException catch (e) {
      state = ArticleImportError(
        message: e.errorCode == 1041
            ? 'This article requires Instapaper Premium'
            : 'Could not load article. Please try again.',
      );
    } catch (e) {
      state = const ArticleImportError(
        message: 'Could not load article. Please try again.',
      );
    }
  }

  /// Reset import state after navigation.
  void clear() {
    state = const ArticleImportIdle();
  }
}
```

### 2. `lib/features/content/widgets/instapaper_bookmark_list.dart`

Update `_BookmarkList` to wire `onBookmarkTap` to the import provider:

```dart
// In _BookmarkList, add a ref.listen for import state:
ref.listen(instapaperArticleImportProvider, (prev, next) {
  if (next is ArticleImportDone) {
    // Navigate to reading screen with the normalised document
    context.push('/read-instapaper', extra: {
      'document': next.document,
      'title': next.title,
    });
    ref.read(instapaperArticleImportProvider.notifier).clear();
  }
});

// Wire onBookmarkTap:
onTap: () => ref.read(instapaperArticleImportProvider.notifier).importArticle(bookmark),
```

Show loading/error overlay when import is in progress:

```dart
final importState = ref.watch(instapaperArticleImportProvider);
// If importState is ArticleImportLoading, show loading overlay on the tapped tile
// If importState is ArticleImportError, show error message with retry
```

### 3. `lib/navigation/app_router.dart`

Add route for Instapaper article reading:

```dart
GoRoute(
  path: '/read-instapaper',
  pageBuilder: (context, state) {
    final extra = state.extra as Map<String, Object?>?;
    final document = extra?['document'] as ExtractedDocument?;
    final title = extra?['title'] as String? ?? 'Instapaper Article';

    // Create a ClipboardDocument-like wrapper, or pass to ParallaxReadingScreen
    // following the same pattern as /read-clipboard
    return wallFoldTransitionPage(
      key: state.pageKey,
      child: ParallaxReadingScreen(
        filePath: 'instapaper://$title',
        clipboardDocument: ClipboardDocument(
          title: title,
          document: document!,
        ),
      ),
    );
  },
),
```

### After modifying providers

Run codegen:

```bash
dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
```

---

## Verification

```bash
dart analyze lib/features/content/providers/instapaper_bookmarks_provider.dart lib/features/content/widgets/instapaper_bookmark_list.dart lib/navigation/app_router.dart
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `InstapaperArticleImport` provider with sealed state (Idle/Loading/Done/Error)
- [ ] `importArticle()` fetches HTML via `getBookmarkText()` then normalises via `ContentNormaliser.normalise(html, ContentType.html)`
- [ ] Loading state shows article title being imported
- [ ] On success, navigates to `/read-instapaper` with `ExtractedDocument`
- [ ] Error state has user-friendly message (not raw exception text)
- [ ] 1041 (Premium required) has specific error message
- [ ] `clear()` resets state after navigation
- [ ] Route added to `app_router.dart` using `wallFoldTransitionPage` transition
- [ ] Navigation uses go_router (`context.push`) — no `Navigator.push()`
- [ ] No raw `CircularProgressIndicator` for loading
- [ ] `dart analyze` reports zero issues
- [ ] `.g.dart` regenerated
- [ ] All public symbols have dartdoc comments
